# Data Retention Policy

Defines how long company data must be retained and when it must be deleted.

All customer data must be retained for a minimum of 7 years per regulatory requirements.
Employees must not delete records subject to legal hold.

## Retention Schedule

- Customer contracts: 7 years
- Financial records: 10 years
- HR records: 5 years after termination
- Email: 3 years
